titleStmt.title: SII 22.53: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 53. (A.R. No. 53 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE GENTRAL SHRINE. TRIBH. KŌNĒRIMAIKOṆḌĀṈ (?)—34th YEAR.

summary.p: The identify of the king is not clear. This records a tax-free gift of half a vēli and odd of land at Erukkilantiṭṭai village near Ākkūr alias Rājēndraśīṅga-chaturvēdi maṅgalam, for rearing a lotus garden for the supply of garlands to god Tirumayānam-Uḍaiyār at Tirukkaḍavūr in Ākkūr-nāḍu and for the maintenance of the persons looking after the garden.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanacakravatti konerimaikoṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭu brahmateyam tirukkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār tirumayāṉa muṭaiyār koyil tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañ ceyvāṉukkum Ittevarkku nittaṟpaṭiyākac ceṅkaḻunīrt tiruppaḷit tāmam cāttiyaruḷa tiruoṭaiyākavum ceṅkaḻunir Ākkuvārkkuk koṟṟukkum puṭavai mutalukkum veṇṭuvaṉavaiyikkum tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyiṭa nām nir vārtta nilattukku Ākkūrāṉa rājentiraciṅkac caruppetimaṅkalattoṭum kūṭṭi Iṟukkiṟa taṇṭalai Erukkilan tiṭṭai Uṭ
paṭṭa nilattu Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy Iṭukiṟa nilattukku Ūrk kaṇakkut taṉmapiriyaṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakku raiye Oru māvaraiyum muṉṉiṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭi tavintu muppattunālāvatu pacāṉmutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyā
ḷvari taraccoṉṉom Innilam muppattunālāvatu pacāṉmutal Ittevarkku (ttevarkku)t tevatānam kkoḷka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiStops unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 22.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
